form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at The Meadows over 525m. Last start finished 2nd over 545m at Ballarat beaten one length (31.16) behind Black Thumb in a Grade 5 on March 30. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Sandown (29.92) in a Grade 5, finishing a 6 length sixth. Has performed well off the draw with a win and five places from eight starts. Key chance and should go close.
